system.description: The Battle-Brother has received training in the broad spectrum of armaments employed by the Adeptus Astartes.
system.benefit: The character is trained in Bolt, Chain, Flame, Las, Launcher, Melta, Plasma, Power, Primitive, SP, and Thrown weapons. In effect, Space Marines are trained in all standard weapon types except Exotic weapons.
system.notes: Astartes only. Grants training in all non-exotic weapons.

specialAbilities.name: Astartes Weapon Training
specialAbilities.description: Trained in all non-exotic weapon types: Bolt, Chain, Melta, Plasma, Power, Flame, Primitive, Las, Launcher, SP, and Thrown. No -20 untrained penalty for these weapons.
